meta.title: Café Siniestro | Risk, insurance and supply chain
meta.description: Café Siniestro: courses, talks and publications about risk management, insurance and supply chain claims.

footer.description: A space to explore risk management, insurance and supply chain claims with a cup of knowledge.

hero.title: Where every claim becomes a lesson.
hero.description: Courses, talks and publications to understand risk, insurance and supply chain with technical judgment.
hero.proof: For insurance, logistics and risk management professionals
hero.visualTitle: Risk, insurance and supply chain without detours.
hero.eventText: Cases, webinars and courses for professionals who need applicable judgment.

method.title: From incident to professional judgment.
method.description: We use real cases to think better about the next risk.

origin.title: Why Café Siniestro?
origin.paragraph1: Those who knew my father remember that every day at 10 a.m. he would stop everything to have his morning coffee. That was the right moment to share with friends and colleagues part of his experience in insurance and claims. Coffee after coffee, he taught people about this market.
origin.paragraph2: When I started giving talks about claims, a good friend told me: “just like your father did”. That was the moment this initiative was born, remembering and honoring him: Café Siniestro.

about.title: A specialized space to learn from real risks.
about.description: We bring together analysis, training and professional conversation about insurance, claims and supply chain.

agenda.title: Courses and talks focused on real cases.

riskManagement.title: Risk management
riskManagement.description: Prevention, scenario reading and decision-making around events that affect operations.

insuranceClaims.title: Insurance and claims
insuranceClaims.description: Concepts, processes and technical criteria to understand claims, coverage and damage assessment.

supplyChain.title: Supply chain
supplyChain.description: Risks in transport, storage, distribution and operational continuity of cargo.

observe.title: We observe the claim
observe.description: We start with losses, damage, delays and responsibilities.

evidence.title: We read the evidence
evidence.description: We organize documents, traceability and early signals.

translate.title: We translate judgment
translate.description: We turn the case into clear classes, guides and conversations.

hero.title: Training to read claims with professional judgment.

supplyChainClaimsBasics.outcome: Understand the full flow of a logistics claim
supplyChainClaimsBasics.description: A clear introduction to how a logistics claim happens, is documented and analyzed.

logisticsRiskManagement.title: Risk management for logistics operations
logisticsRiskManagement.outcome: Detect critical points before they escalate
logisticsRiskManagement.description: Practical tools to identify critical points in transport, storage and distribution.

assessmentEvidenceCriteria.title: Assessment, evidence and evaluation criteria
assessmentEvidenceCriteria.outcome: Read evidence and technical criteria with more clarity
assessmentEvidenceCriteria.description: A technical conversation about documentation, evidence, responsibility and damage reading.

projectCargoClaims.title: General average and Project Cargo
projectCargoClaims.outcome: Understand critical risks in special cargo
projectCargoClaims.description: An applied session about maritime transport, project cargo, responsibilities and key documentation.
